response.overview: At the peak of his career, celebrated singer-songwriter Eli is pressured by his record label to immediately release another chart-topping hit after claiming the number one spot. Exhausted and creatively drained, he escapes the noise of success and turns to his lifelong best friend Raf, whose quiet optimism masks a fragile heart condition. Raf proposes a spontaneous getaway—one last pause from the world—to help Eli reconnect with his music and himself. As they travel, moments of laughter, silence, and unspoken tension shape a song that Eli writes piece by piece, drawing from their shared history and the emotions he cannot bring himself to say aloud. By the time the song is finished, Eli is ready to share his truth with the world—only to realize he may have waited too long to share it with the person who inspired it most.
response.title: Irog
